{"cards": [{"name": "Skywatch Inquisitor", "mana_cost": "{1}{W}{U}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["W", "U"], "color_identity": ["W", "U"], "type_line": "Creature — Human Wizard", "oracle_text": "Flying
When ~ enters, exile target nonland permanent until ~ leaves the battlefield.
Whenever you draw a card during your turn, you gain 1 life.", "flavor_text": ""Truth and order shine brightest from above the chaos."", "power": "2", "toughness": "2", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "Azorius signpost combining white's temporary exile removal with blue's card draw synergy. Flying fits both colors. The exile ability is white-style removal that's temporary (not permanent destruction), while the card draw trigger rewards the blue archetype's strategy. Balanced at 3 mana for a 2/2 flyer with significant upside."}, {"name": "Bloodpact Ravager", "mana_cost": "{2}{B}{R}", "cmc": 4, "colors": ["B", "R"], "color_identity": ["B", "R"], "type_line": "Creature — Demon Berserker", "oracle_text": "Haste
When ~ enters, you may sacrifice a creature. If you do, ~ deals damage equal to the sacrificed creature's power to any target.
At the beginning of your end step, if a creature died this turn, put a +1/+1 counter on ~.", "flavor_text": "It feeds on violence, growing stronger with each life claimed.", "power": "3", "toughness": "2", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "rare", "design_notes": "Rakdos build-around that rewards aggressive sacrifice strategies. Black provides the sacrifice theme, red provides haste and direct damage. The end step trigger rewards the aggressive Rakdos gameplan of trading creatures. Creates interesting decisions about when to sacrifice and what to target. Power level appropriate for rare with build-around potential."}, {"name": "Wayfarer's Compass", "mana_cost": "{2}", "cmc": 2, "colors": [], "color_identity": [], "type_line": "Artifact", "oracle_text": "{T}: Add {C}.
{1}, {T}: Look at the top card of your library. If it's a land card, you may put it into your hand.", "flavor_text": ""Even in the darkest wilderness, it points toward hope."", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Simple mana rock with utility ability. The second ability helps smooth draws and find lands, which is useful in limited environments. Costed appropriately at 2 mana for a mana rock with minor upside. The land-finding ability is slow enough to not be oppressive but provides meaningful value over time."}, {"name": "Chronarch's Observatory", "mana_cost": "{4}", "cmc": 4, "colors": [], "color_identity": [], "type_line": "Artifact", "oracle_text": "{T}: Add {C}{C}.
{2}, {T}: Scry 2, then draw a card.
{5}, {T}: Take an extra turn after this one.", "flavor_text": ""Time bends to those who understand its true nature."", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "rare", "design_notes": "Complex artifact with escalating abilities. First ability provides ramp, second provides card selection and advantage, third is a powerful but expensive effect. The extra turn ability is costed high enough to be fair but provides a powerful late-game threat. Each ability has proper tap/cost syntax and the mana costs create interesting resource management decisions."}, {"name": "Seraphine, Divine Arbiter", "mana_cost": "{2}{W}{B}", "cmc": 4, "colors": ["W", "B"], "color_identity": ["W", "B"], "type_line": "Legendary Planeswalker — Seraphine", "oracle_text": "+1: You gain 3 life and each opponent loses 1 life.
-2: Exile target creature. Its controller may pay {4}. If they don't, put a 1/1 white Spirit creature token with flying onto the battlefield.
-7: You get an emblem with "Whenever a creature dies, you may return target creature card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield."", "flavor_text": null, "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": "4", "rarity": "mythic", "design_notes": "Orzhov planeswalker combining white's lifegain and tokens with black's life drain and reanimation. +1 ability provides incremental advantage typical of both colors. -2 gives flexible removal with white's 'taxing' element and token creation. Ultimate creates long-term value engine fitting Orzhov's recursive themes. Starting loyalty and costs are balanced for competitive play."}]}
